## AMC Drift Policy Check (minimal)
- [ ] Section architecture changed? If yes, list affected sections.
- [ ] Render contract changed? If yes, confirm `docs/amc_render_contract.md` update.
- [ ] DOCX placeholder inventory changed? If yes, note inventory delta.
- [ ] Native metadata inventory changed? If yes, confirm `docs/amc_native_metadata_inventory.md` update.
- [ ] Tier behavior changed (Essential/Executive)? If yes, describe impact.
- [ ] Comparative vs single-path rendering behavior changed? If yes, describe expected output difference.
- [ ] Documentation updated, or explicitly not needed (state reason).

## Validation
- [ ] Local checks/tests relevant to this PR were run.
- [ ] No unintended contract-breaking drift introduced.
